headline: US export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were lifted after a two-week freeze.
body: The Department of Commerce and White House reversed a two-week ban on Anthropic's most advanced Fable and Mythos models, with the company set to restore access beginning July 1. Coverage spanned mainstream outlets and independent voices, tying the reversal to frontier-model deployment and AI safety. On the technique side, a dense cluster of interpretability and training methods broke out simultaneously: trajectory data, agent skills, behavioral auditing, ablation, and masking all led momentum, joined by newer entrants in adaptive gating, feature modulation, and feature splitting. Latent Space also flagged Sonnet 5 and an upcoming Fable 5 as the model landscape reopens.

cited_items.title: White House drops restrictions on Anthropic AI models after two-week ban - The Washington Post
Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
US lifts curbs on Anthropic's Fable, Mythos AI models
WhiteHouse lifts export control on Anthropic that froze its most advanced models
